analysis.consistency: Consistent with standard D&D 5e feature naming conventions and structure. The feature is a core class feature for the Barbarian.
analysis.quality: High quality. The description is accurate and directly quotes the relevant section from the Player's Handbook (PHB).

mechanics.effect: Allows the character to make two attacks when using the Attack action, instead of the standard one attack.
mechanics.mechanical_impact: Significant combat power increase, standard for Extra Attack features across martial classes at level 5.
mechanics.notes: This is a foundational martial capability.
